scripts.test:tbo: tsc lib/tbo/*.ts --outDir .tbo-build --module commonjs --target es2019 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && node lib/tbo/__tests__/logic.test.cjs
scripts.test:payments: tsc lib/tbo/*.ts lib/payments/*.ts --outDir .pay-build --module commonjs --target es2019 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck && node lib/payments/__tests__/logic.test.cjs
